howToOrder.title: How to order
howToOrder.step1Desc: Browse the catalog to find the best deals and add them to your cart.
howToOrder.step2Desc: Review your cart, compare direct and external offers, adjust quantities.
howToOrder.step3Desc: Confirm and pay by card, bank transfer or deferred payment (30/60 days).
howToOrder.step4Desc: Shipping within 24-48h. A problem? Guaranteed resolution within 24h.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: MediKong is a B2B marketplace that aggregates offers from over 350 verified medical suppliers. You can buy directly, compare market prices, or be redirected to the most competitive external offers.
faq.a2: All healthcare professionals in Belgium: pharmacies, hospitals, clinics, nursing homes, medical practices, physiotherapists, dentists, purchasing centers and authorized resellers.
faq.a3: Prices are displayed excluding VAT. The applicable VAT is added at checkout based on your status and location.
faq.a4: Orders are shipped within 24-48h from our suppliers' warehouses in Belgium and Europe. Tracking is integrated in your customer area.

cta.title: Find the best deals on thousands of medical references.
cta.subtitle: One place for all your B2B medical purchases.

faq.q1: How to create a professional account?
faq.a1: Go to the registration page and choose 'I want to buy'. Enter your company and VAT number. Your account will be validated within 24h.
faq.q2: How to modify or cancel an order?
faq.a2: You can modify or cancel an order as long as it hasn't been shipped. Go to 'My Orders' in your account area.
faq.a3: We accept Visa, Mastercard, Bancontact, SEPA transfer and deferred payment 30/60 days via Mondu (subject to conditions).
faq.a4: Send an email to support@medikong.pro (response within 24h) or via the contact form. Live chat will be available soon.
faq.a5: A tracking number is sent by email upon shipment. You can also track your order in real time from 'My Orders' in your account area.
faq.a6: Most orders are shipped within 24-48h. Standard delivery takes 2-5 business days in Belgium and 3-7 days in the rest of the EU.
faq.q7: How to become a seller on MediKong?
faq.a7: Go to the 'Become a Seller' page and fill in the registration form. Our team will verify your documents within 48h.
faq.q8: How does VAT work on MediKong?
faq.a8: Displayed prices are excl. VAT. Applicable VAT is calculated automatically based on the delivery country and product type (standard or reduced rate).

creerCompte.title: How to create a professional account?
creerCompte.s1: To create an account on MediKong, you must be a registered healthcare professional in Belgium or the European Union. You will need your BCE number (Belgium) or equivalent, your intra-community VAT number, and a professional email address.
creerCompte.s2:
1. Go to the registration page and select "I want to buy".
2. Enter your professional details (company name, BCE, VAT).
3. Add your delivery and billing address.
4. Confirm your email via the verification link.
creerCompte.s3: Our team verifies your information within 24 business hours. You will receive a confirmation email once your account is activated. In the meantime, you can browse the catalog but not place orders.

premiereCommande.title: How to place my first order?
premiereCommande.s1: Use the search bar to find products by name, CNK, EAN or brand. You can also browse categories or filter by supplier.
premiereCommande.s2: Click "Add" to put a product in your cart. Adjust quantities directly. Watch the MOV (Minimum Order Value) for each supplier, displayed in the cart.
premiereCommande.s3: Check your cart, choose your payment method (card, SEPA transfer, deferred payment) and confirm your delivery address. The order is sent to suppliers upon validation.

naviguerCatalogue.title: How to browse the catalog?
naviguerCatalogue.s1: The MediKong catalog offers over 12,500 references. Use text search, filters by category, brand, price, availability and supplier to refine your results.
naviguerCatalogue.s2: Each product page shows all available offers, sorted by price. You can compare excl. VAT prices, delivery times and MOVs for each supplier.

passerCommande.title: How to place an order?
passerCommande.s1: Browse the catalog and add desired products to your cart. Prices are displayed excl. VAT and updated in real time.
passerCommande.s2: In the cart, products are grouped by supplier. Verify that each supplier meets their MOV (Minimum Order Value). The progress bar shows the remaining amount.
passerCommande.s3: Choose your payment method, confirm the delivery address and validate. You will receive an email confirmation with the order number.

moyensPaiement.title: What payment methods are accepted?
moyensPaiement.s1: MediKong accepts bank cards (Visa, Mastercard, Bancontact) and SEPA transfers. Payment is secured via our PCI-DSS certified provider.
moyensPaiement.s2: Eligible customers can benefit from 30 or 60-day deferred payment via our partner Mondu. Eligibility is automatically verified at checkout. No additional fees.

suivreColis.title: How to track my parcel?
suivreColis.s1: Once your order is shipped, you receive an email with the tracking number and a direct link to the carrier. Main carriers are DPD, GLS and PostNL.
suivreColis.s2: Log in to your account and go to "My Orders". Each order shows its real-time status: preparing, shipped, in transit or delivered.

retournerProduit.title: How to return a product?
retournerProduit.s1: You have 14 days after delivery to return an unopened product in its original packaging. Temperature-sensitive or single-use products are not eligible for return.
retournerProduit.s2:
1. Go to "My Orders" in your account.
2. Select the order and click "Request a return".
3. Indicate the reason for return.
4. A prepaid return label will be sent by email.
retournerProduit.s3: The refund is processed within 5-10 business days after receiving the returned product. The amount is credited to the original payment method.

tvaMedikong.title: How does VAT work on MediKong?
tvaMedikong.s1: All prices on MediKong are displayed excluding VAT by default. You can switch between excl. and incl. VAT via the VAT button in the navigation bar.
tvaMedikong.s2: VAT is calculated automatically at checkout based on your delivery country and product type. In Belgium, the standard rate is 21% and the reduced rate is 6% for medical devices. Intra-community purchases with a valid VAT number are exempt (reverse charge).

telechargerFactures.title: Where to download my invoices?
telechargerFactures.s1: Go to "My Account" > "My Orders". Each delivered order has a "Download Invoice" button in PDF format.
telechargerFactures.s2: Invoices are generated automatically upon shipment. They include all required legal information (VAT, BCE number, addresses). You can also receive invoices by email automatically by enabling the option in your settings.

modifierFacturation.title: How to update my billing information?
modifierFacturation.s1: Go to "My Account" > "Settings" > "Billing". You can update your company name, billing address, VAT number and invoice delivery preferences. Changes apply to future orders only.

signalerProbleme.title: How to report a problem with my order?
signalerProbleme.s1: Go to "My Orders" and click on the relevant order. Use the "Report a Problem" button to open a claim. Describe the issue and attach photos if needed.
signalerProbleme.s2: You can report: damaged product, missing product, incorrect product, delivery delay, or billing issue. Each type has an adapted resolution process.

delaiRemboursement.title: What is the refund timeframe?
delaiRemboursement.s1:
Bank card: 5-10 business days after return validation.
SEPA transfer: 3-5 business days.
Deferred payment: deduction on the next invoice.

You receive a confirmation email as soon as the refund is initiated.

suivreReclamation.title: How to track my claim?
suivreReclamation.s1: Each claim has a tracking number. Go to "My Orders" > relevant order > "Claims" to see real-time status. Our team commits to responding within 24 business hours.

ajouterUtilisateur.title: How to add a user?
ajouterUtilisateur.s1: If you have a business account, go to "My Account" > "Team". Click "Invite a user", enter their email and set their role (buyer, administrator, observer). The user will receive an invitation email.

securiserCompte.title: How to secure my account?
securiserCompte.s1: Use a password of at least 12 characters, combining letters, numbers and special characters. Do not reuse a password from another service.
securiserCompte.s2: Change your password regularly (every 3 months). Never share your credentials. Log out from shared devices. Regularly check the login history in "My Account" > "Security".

gererCatalogue.title: How to manage my seller catalog?
gererCatalogue.s1: Log in to your Seller Area and go to "Catalog". You can add products one by one or in bulk via CSV/Excel import. Each product must have a valid EAN/GTIN.
gererCatalogue.s2: In the "Offers" tab, set your prices, stock quantities, MOQ (minimum order quantity) and delivery times. Offers are visible immediately after validation.

marquageCe.title: What is CE marking?
marquageCe.s1: CE marking (European Conformity) is a mandatory certification for medical devices marketed in the European Economic Area. It certifies that the product meets the essential safety and performance requirements defined by European directives.
marquageCe.s2: MediKong verifies the CE marking of each listed product via EUDAMED databases and certificates provided by manufacturers. Non-compliant products are removed from the catalog.

comparaisonPrix.title: How to use price comparison?
comparaisonPrix.s1: Each product page displays all available offers, sorted by excl. VAT price. You can see at a glance the price, supplier, available stock, MOQ and delivery time.
comparaisonPrix.s2: In addition to direct offers, MediKong displays market reference prices. This allows you to check if the offer is competitive compared to usual rates.

configurerAlertes.title: How to set up price alerts?
configurerAlertes.s1: On a product page, click "Watch Price". Set your target excl. VAT price. You will receive an email as soon as an offer reaches or goes below this threshold. Manage all your alerts in "My Account" > "Price Alerts".

accederApi.title: How to access the MediKong API?
accederApi.s1: The MediKong API allows you to integrate the catalog, prices and order placement into your ERP or management system. Access is reserved for Pro or Enterprise plan customers.
accederApi.s2: Complete API documentation is available upon request. It covers catalog, pricing, stock, orders and webhooks endpoints. Contact your account manager to obtain your API keys.

guideAchat.title: Buying guide for pharmacies
guideAchat.s1: As a pharmacist, MediKong allows you to compare prices from hundreds of suppliers in one place. Start with high-turnover items (gloves, masks, disinfectants) to maximize savings.
guideAchat.s2: Group your orders by supplier to meet MOVs and benefit from free delivery. Use price alerts to buy at the best time. Deferred payment lets you manage your cash flow with ease.

bonnesPratiques.title: B2B ordering best practices
bonnesPratiques.s1: Anticipate your needs by analyzing your consumption history. Order regularly in small quantities rather than bulk purchases to avoid stockouts and optimize cash flow.
bonnesPratiques.s2: Diversify your supply sources to reduce stockout risks. MediKong brings together 350+ verified suppliers. Compare offers and delivery times before each order. Use favorites lists to speed up recurring purchases.
